instruction:
Complete a verifiable sunrise landscape photo enhancement workflow using the image at /home/user/Desktop/matressa-lake-5698492_1920.jpg. Each step produces measurable, verifiable outputs:

1. Create a new layer named exactly 'Sky_Golden' above the background. Use the Free Select tool to select the sky area (top 50% of the image). Apply Color Balance adjustment: add +25 to Red channel and +20 to Yellow channel to enhance the golden sunrise tones.

2. Create a new layer named exactly 'Water_Reflection' above 'Sky_Golden'. Use the Hue-Saturation adjustment on the water area (bottom 40% of the image): increase saturation by exactly +30 to make the reflections more vibrant.

3. Create a new layer named exactly 'Mountain_Detail' above 'Water_Reflection'. Use the Curves adjustment on the mountain silhouette area: create a slight S-curve to increase contrast by 20%, making the mountain outlines more defined.

4. Create a new layer named exactly 'Building_Warmth' above 'Mountain_Detail'. Use the Color Balance adjustment on the building areas: add +15 to Red and +10 to Yellow to warm up the building tones.

5. Create a new layer named exactly 'Vignette' at the top of the layer stack. Use the Elliptical Select tool to create an oval covering 75% of the image from center, apply Select > Feather with 120px radius, invert selection, and fill with black at 25% opacity.

6. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Title' at the top-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'SUNRISE SERENITY'
   - Font size: 36px
   - Color: #ffffff (white)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 30px from top edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Title'

7. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Location' at the bottom-right corner with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'LAKE MATRESSA'
   - Font size: 22px
   - Color: #ffd700 (gold)
   - Position: 25px from right edge, 25px from bottom edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Location'

8. Create a new layer named exactly 'Frame' at the very top. Use Select > All, then Edit > Stroke Selection with a 10px solid color #8b4513 (saddle brown) to create a border around the entire image.

9. Export the final image as 'sunrise_masterpiece.jpg' with exact specifications: JPEG format, width 1600 pixels (height auto), quality 95. Save the project as 'sunrise_project.xcf' with all layers preserved.

command: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'ctrl', 'e'); time.sleep(1); pyautogui.write('sunrise_masterpiece'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter'); time.sleep(2); pyautogui.press('enter')

import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'ctrl', 's'); time.sleep(1); pyautogui.write('sunrise_project.xcf'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter'); time.sleep(2); pyautogui.press('enter')
